notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez hit by pitch. Jesús Sánchez to 3rd. Daulton Varsho to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw singles on a ground ball to third baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Davis Schneider out at 2nd. Lenyn Sosa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Davis Schneider out at 2nd. Lenyn Sosa out at 1st.
